title: Falcon - Pair Headset with Charge Stand
feature: Falcon - Pair Headset with Charge Stand
scenario: Verify that an unpaired headset can be paired via the charge stand, and that the stand info persists in Device Settings > Software Update after removal, restart, and app restart.
steps: 1. Ensure the headset has not been previously paired with the charge stand.
2. Place the headset on the charge stand to initiate pairing.
3. After pairing, navigate to Device Settings > Software Update tab.
4. Verify that the charge stand info appears in the Software Update tab.
5. Remove the headset from the charge stand.
8. Navigate back to Device Settings > Software Update tab.
9. Verify that the charge stand info still persists.
expected: The charge stand info should appear in Device Settings > Software Update tab after pairing and persist after removing the headset, restarting the device, and restarting the app.
